scripts.test: node -e "console.log('No dedicated automated test runner is configured yet. Use npm run check for lint and typecheck.')"
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @training-platform/shared && npm run build --workspace @training-platform/api && npm run build --workspace @training-platform/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @training-platform/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @training-platform/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @training-platform/web
